hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qiE '\.(env|credentials|secret)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: blocked edit to secrets/credentials file"}}'; exit 0; fi; if [ -n "$f" ] && ! echo "$f" | grep -qE '(src/|clients/|docs/|\.claude/|\.github/|tests/|benches/|Cargo\.|CLAUDE\.md|web/|deploy/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: file outside allowed project paths"}}'; exit 0; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(rm -rf /[^a-z]|DROP TABLE|git push --force.*(main|master))'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: blocked destructive command"}}'; exit 0; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE '(api_key|password|secret|token)\s*=\s*[\x27"][a-zA-Z0-9]{20}'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: staged files contain potential secrets. Remove before committing."}}'; exit 0; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Harness: scanning for secrets in staged files...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then result=$(cargo check 2>&1 | tail -5); if echo "$result" | grep -q 'error'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Compilation failed after edit. Fix the error:\\n$result\"}}"; else echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; fi; else echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; fi; }
